deliverables.description: Comprehensive project README with overview, features, quick start (Docker/binary/source), full configuration reference table, channel setup guides (Telegram/Discord/Slack/WhatsApp/CLI), architecture overview with crate diagram, CLI reference, development guide, feature flags, contributing guidelines, and license
API reference for all 12 core traits plus FileTransfer sub-trait, with full method signatures, descriptions, associated types, and implementation crate references

API reference for key types: InboundMessage, OutboundMessage, CompletionRequest, CompletionResponse, StreamChunk, ChatMessage, ContentPart, Role, ReceivedFile, OutboundFile, FileMetadata, SessionContext, Temm1eConfig, Temm1eError with all fields documented
Full configuration reference with per-section tables, provider examples (Anthropic/OpenAI/Google), environment variable mapping, vault:// URI scheme, and a complete production config example

Developer getting started guide: prerequisites, Rust installation, building (debug/release/musl/features), running, configuration for development, running tests, linting, formatting, Docker development

Architecture guide: design principles, crate dependency graph, core crate details, message processing pipeline data flow, credential flow, async runtime model, concurrency model, error handling strategy, configuration system, dual-mode defaults, extension points
Step-by-step tutorial for adding a new messaging channel: trait implementation, module creation, dependency management, feature flags, gateway wiring, configuration, testing, and checklist
Step-by-step tutorial for adding a new AI provider: trait implementation, request/response mapping, streaming SSE parsing, tool calling support, retry logic, health checks, testing, and checklist

Deployment guide covering Docker (build, run, compose, persistent storage), Fly.io (launch, secrets, scaling, monitoring), and Terraform/AWS (EC2 + EBS, variables, outputs, updating, destroying) with deployment checklist

Operational configuration guide: configuration hierarchy, TEMM1E_* environment variable mapping, ${ENV_VAR} expansion, vault:// URI scheme, cloud/local/auto mode settings, ZeroClaw/OpenClaw compatibility, validation commands

Monitoring guide: /health endpoint, structured JSON logging, log levels, correlation IDs, metrics (counters/histograms/gauges), OpenTelemetry integration, collector setup, Grafana dashboard recommendations, SLIs, alert rules, log aggregation, audit logging

notes: All documentation written from source code and architecture documents. Trait signatures match the actual Rust code exactly. Configuration tables cover every field in the Temm1eConfig struct. Deployment guides reference the actual Dockerfile and Terraform configs in the repository.
